last_result: done — AGENTS.md at repo root references all make targets, web verify gate, and DEFAULTS.md; reviewed (one doc fix applied); all Go gates green
notes: Foundation band: one item left — verify the web gate (npm ci -> typecheck/build) is green from a fresh install (now documented in AGENTS.md). After that, move to band 1 (security).
